category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Zambia) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Zambia Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入赞比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入尚比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Zambia market-access requirements: ZABS conformity and import inspection, ZS/IEC 62133 cell safety, ZICTA wireless type approval, UN 38.3 transport, and in-country importer obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与赞比亚市场准入要求对照：ZABS合格评定与进口检验、ZS/IEC 62133电芯安全、ZICTA无线型号核准、UN 38.3运输及在地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與尚比亞市場准入要求對照：ZABS合格評定與進口檢驗、ZS/IEC 62133電芯安全、ZICTA無線型號核准、UN 38.3運輸及在地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment body determination, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Zambia should plan for ZABS conformity assessment and import inspection (with the ZABS mark where the product is regulated), ZS/IEC 62133 cell safety evidence, ZICTA type approval for any wireless function, UN 38.3 transport documentation, and an in-country importer — none of which are automatically satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification. Zambia generally adopts IEC-based standards and does not operate an EU-style horizontal battery, RoHS, or outdoor-noise regime.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口赞比亚，应安排ZABS合格评定与进口检验（受管制产品须加施ZABS标志）、ZS/IEC 62133电芯安全证据、任何无线功能的ZICTA型号核准、UN 38.3运输文件，并设立在地进口商——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证自动替代。赞比亚通常采用基于IEC的标准，且不设欧盟式的横向电池、RoHS或户外噪声法规体系。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口尚比亞，應安排ZABS合格評定與進口檢驗（受管制產品須加施ZABS標誌）、ZS/IEC 62133電芯安全證據、任何無線功能的ZICTA型號核准、UN 38.3運輸文件，並設立在地進口商——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證自動替代。尚比亞通常採用基於IEC的標準，且不設歐盟式的橫向電池、RoHS或戶外噪聲法規體系。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator or standards-body sources preferred (ZABS, ZICTA, ISO/IEC, UNECE).
